case_title: RICHCO, INC. OF PALO ALTO VS CERVETTO, JOSEPH M. DBA JMC BUILDING SERVICES CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $740.25 FILED BY RICHCO, INC. OF PALO ALTO AS TO DEFENDANT CERVETTO, JOSEPH M. DBA JMC BUILDING SERVICES CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO DEFEND, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CERVETTO, JOSEPH M. DBA JMC BUILDING SERVICES CO.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-18-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-15-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH CERVETTO RETURN MOVED LEFT NO ADDRESS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHCO, INC. OF PALO ALTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CERVETTO, JOSEPH M. DBA JMC BUILDING SERVICES CO. $740.25 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $795.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO JOSEPH CERVETTO RETURNED, MOVED.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CERVETTO, JOSEPH M. DBA JMC BUILDING SERVICES CO.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CERVETTO, JOSEPH M. DBA JMC BUILDING SERVICES CO. HEARING SET FOR OCT-06-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-06-1993, DENIED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $439.95 AS TO DEFENDANT CERVETTO, JOSEPH M. DBA JMC BUILDING SERVICES CO.
